{{Infobox character
| name = Andra Agnos
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
| name = Andra Agnos
| aliases = Andra
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| titles = youngest Valinhall Traveler, Valinhall Traveler
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

''See also: [[Andra Agnos Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Andra [[Agnos]] is a young woman and a member of the [[Agnos family]], which includes her parents, Olissa and Caius, and her younger brother, [[Lycus]]. Characterized by her tanned skin and blond hair, she is noted for her spirited and often playful personality, frequently using humor or smirking even in difficult situations. As she matured from thirteen to fourteen years old, she transitioned into the role of a [[Valinhall]] [[Traveler]], a status marked by black chains appearing on her forearms. In combat, she has been seen utilizing various tools and weapons, including a smith's hammer and a short [[sword]] featuring a black-spotted blade. Despite her tendency toward excitement and occasional lack of focus, she has demonstrated capability in battle, such as defeating golems, and has shown moments of serious determination and authority.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Thirteen-year-old Andra [[Agnos]] lives behind a mushroom-cap door with her sibling, [[Lycus]]. While trapped in a cave for nearly an entire day alongside [[Simon]], she was eventually discovered curled up on a rock promontory situated above the rock-worms. After being rescued by [[Simon]], she attempted to prevent him from killing [[Erastes]], a man she had known her entire life. Although she possesses the [[sword]], Andra lacks the other gifts and is currently only able to open her bath, garden, and bedroom. She eventually brought five healthy sons and daughters to [[the Nye]].}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Andra is a sibling of [[Lycus]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11">''House of Blades'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Andra is thirteen years old.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Andra and [[Lycus]] were trapped in a cave for almost a whole day.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Andra and [[Lycus]] live behind a mushroom-cap door.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Andra is a child who was with [[Simon]] in the cave.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c12">''House of Blades'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Andra is currently inside the cave.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Andra was found curled up on a rock promontory above the rock-worms.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13">''House of Blades'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Andra is a person whom [[Simon]] rescued.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14">''House of Blades'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Andra tries to stop [[Simon]] from killing [[Erastes]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15">''House of Blades'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Andra has known [[Erastes]] all her life.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Andra Agnos]] has the [[sword]] but none of the other gifts.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18">''House of Blades'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Andra Agnos]] can currently only open her bedroom, the garden, and the bath.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Andra brought five healthy sons and daughters to [[the Nye]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18" />}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Andra [[Agnos]] is a woman characterized by her long blond hair and a tendency to become easily excited over minor matters. During an ordeal in [[Orgrith Cave]], her life was saved by [[Simon]]. Later, while working in the [[workshop]], she struggled with an inability to make a particular task function correctly. She was eventually seen waving to [[Simon]] from a hallway before she disappeared into a bedroom.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Andra has a tendency to get excited over small things.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] saved [[Andra Agnos]]' life in [[Orgrith Cave]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Andra Agnos]] waved to [[Simon]] from down a hallway before vanishing into a bedroom.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Andra is unable to make something work in the [[workshop]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Andra has long blond hair.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The daughter of Olissa and Caius, Andra [[Agnos]] is a young blond [[Valinhall]] [[Traveler]] and the sister of [[Lycus]]. Marked by chain-shaped patterns on her arms, she carries a lightly curved blade and is associated with the Dragon's Fangs. During an attack by the [[Tartarus Incarnation]], she ran forward to assist in the fight using the [[sword]] [[Seijan]]. Later, as part of a group tasked with separating enemies, she followed orders from [[Simon]] to combat the golems of the [[Ornheim Incarnation]] with her black-spotted [[sword]].}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Andra is the daughter of Olissa.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6">''City of Light'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Andra Agnos]] is the youngest [[Valinhall]] [[Traveler]] and the daughter of Olissa and Caius.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8">''City of Light'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Andra suggested that it would escape.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Andra Agnos]] is [[Lycus]]'s sister.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c13">''City of Light'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Andra Agnos]] is a [[Valinhall]] [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Andra Agnos]] has chain-shaped marks on her arms.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Andra possesses a lightly curved blade.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Andra is fighting the [[Tartarus Incarnation]] with a [[Dragon's Fang]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Andra is a young girl [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Andra uses the [[sword]] [[Seijan]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Andra ran forward to help during the [[Incarnation]]'s attack.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Andra is a person [[Simon]] suspects might have pounded on his door.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16">''City of Light'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Andra is a person [[Indirial]] mentions in relation to the Dragon's Fangs.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Andra carries an ordinary [[sword]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24">''City of Light'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Andra was present in [[Simon]]'s bedroom.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Andra is present and readying her [[sword]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25">''City of Light'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Andra has a [[Dragon's Fang]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Andra is part of a group intended to separate enemies.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] gives orders to Andra.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Andra is a blond girl with a black-spotted [[sword]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Andra fought the [[Ornheim Incarnation]]'s golems.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|“It’s almost been a whole day,” Andra whispered.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|“I’ve known him all my life,” Andra said, her voice thick with emotion.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Travelers]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
